name: OCCIDENTAL PETROLEUM CORP /DE/
business: Occidental Petroleum is an oil and gas company engaged in the exploration, development, production, and marketing of oil, natural gas liquids (NGL), and natural gas. It also operates a midstream and marketing segment and is developing low-carbon ventures including direct air capture and carbon sequestration.

exposures.sentence: The Company's financial results correlate closely to the prices it obtains for its products, particularly oil and, to a lesser extent, NGL and natural gas.
The Company is exposed to cybersecurity, digital infrastructure and data security risks.
The Company has a joint venture agreement with BlackRock, through a fund managed by its Diversified Infrastructure business, for the development of STRATOS.

catalysts.event: STRATOS direct air capture facility begins operations
catalysts.sentence: Completed construction of STRATOS central processing facilities and obtained Class VI permits to sequester CO2, with operations expected to begin in 2026.
The sale was completed on January 2, 2026, resulting in an estimated gain of $3.2 billion, net of taxes and subject to post-closing adjustments.
